settings.heading: What is Onelife Health?
settings.row_content: Onelife Health is South Africa's leading health supplement retailer with over 10,000 products, 200+ trusted brands, and 3 stores in Gauteng (Centurion, Glen Village, Edenvale). We've been serving South Africans for 25+ years.

settings.heading: Do you offer free delivery?
settings.row_content: Yes! We offer free delivery on all orders over R400. Orders placed before 12pm are dispatched the same day. Standard delivery takes 3-7 business days depending on your location.

settings.heading: Can I collect in-store?
settings.row_content: Absolutely! You can collect your order from any of our 3 stores: Centurion (117 Galaway Ave, Hennopspark), Glen Village (Glen Village South, Faerie Glen), or Edenvale (Shop 7, Green Valley Shopping Centre).

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We accept returns within 14 days of purchase for unopened products in their original packaging. Please visit our Return Policy page for full details.

settings.heading: Do you offer health consultations?
settings.row_content: Yes! We offer free 15-minute health consultations with our qualified health professionals who have 15+ years of experience. Book your free consultation here.

settings.heading: How does the rewards programme work?
settings.row_content: Our My Health Rewards programme lets you earn points on every purchase. Points can be redeemed for discounts on future orders. Visit My Health Rewards to learn more.

settings.heading: Are your products authentic?
settings.row_content: 100%. We source all products directly from manufacturers and authorised distributors. Every product sold through Onelife Health is genuine and authentic.

settings.heading: Do you ship nationwide?
settings.row_content: Yes, we deliver to all areas in South Africa. Delivery times vary by location: Gauteng (2-3 days), other metro areas (3-5 days), rural areas (5-7 days).

settings.text: Email us at info@onelife.co.za or WhatsApp us on (071) 374 4910
